audit_status.source_base: Hebrew Exodus / Shemot tabernacle completion text tradition, draft aligned to public-domain comparison layer later
audit_status.review_note: First-pass draft reviewed for tabernacle erection, anointing, priestly washing/clothing, completion formula, cloud/glory filling dwelling, and journey guidance.

verses.restored: YHWH spoke to Moses, saying,
On first day of first month you shall raise dwelling-place of tent of meeting.
Put there ark of testimony, and screen ark with veil.
Bring in table and arrange its arrangement; bring in lampstand and raise its lamps.
Set gold altar for incense before ark of testimony, and put screen of entrance for dwelling-place.
Set altar of burnt offering before entrance of dwelling-place of tent of meeting.
Set basin between tent of meeting and altar, and put water there.
Set court around, and put screen of gate of court.
Take anointing oil and anoint dwelling-place and all that is in it; sanctify it and all its vessels, and it shall be holy.
Anoint altar of burnt offering and all its vessels; sanctify altar, and altar shall be Holy of Holies.
Anoint basin and its stand, and sanctify it.
Bring Aaron and his sons near to entrance of tent of meeting, and wash them with water.
Clothe Aaron with holy garments, anoint him, and sanctify him, so he may serve as priest to me.
Bring his sons near and clothe them with tunics.
Anoint them as you anointed their father, so they may serve as priests to me; their anointing shall be for them for age-long priesthood throughout generations.
Moses did according to all that YHWH commanded him; so he did.
It happened in first month in second year, on first of month, dwelling-place was raised.
Moses raised dwelling-place, set its bases, put its frames, put its bars, and raised its pillars.
He spread tent over dwelling-place and put covering of tent over it above, as YHWH commanded Moses.
He took and put testimony into ark, set poles on ark, and put cover upon ark above.
He brought ark into dwelling-place, put veil of screen, and screened ark of testimony, as YHWH commanded Moses.
He put table in tent of meeting, on north side of dwelling-place, outside veil.
He arranged upon it arrangement of bread before YHWH, as YHWH commanded Moses.
He put lampstand in tent of meeting opposite table, on south side of dwelling-place.
He raised lamps before YHWH, as YHWH commanded Moses.
He put gold altar in tent of meeting before veil.
He burned fragrant incense upon it, as YHWH commanded Moses.
He put screen of entrance for dwelling-place.
Altar of burnt offering he put at entrance of dwelling-place of tent of meeting, and offered upon it burnt offering and grain offering, as YHWH commanded Moses.
He put basin between tent of meeting and altar, and put water there for washing.
Moses and Aaron and his sons washed from it their hands and feet.
When they entered tent of meeting and when they approached altar, they washed, as YHWH commanded Moses.
He raised court around dwelling-place and altar, and put screen of gate of court. So Moses completed the work.
Then cloud covered tent of meeting, and glory of YHWH filled dwelling-place.
Moses was not able to enter tent of meeting, because cloud dwelt upon it, and glory of YHWH filled dwelling-place.
When cloud was lifted from over dwelling-place, children of Israel would journey in all their journeys.
But if cloud was not lifted, they would not journey until day it was lifted.
For cloud of YHWH was upon dwelling-place by day, and fire was in it by night, before eyes of all house of Israel in all their journeys.

translation_notes: Exodus ends with mishkan raised and glory filling it: the liberation goal of YHWH dwelling in the midst is achieved.
Repeated 'as YHWH commanded Moses' marks faithful completion after calf rupture and renewal.
Moses cannot enter once glory fills dwelling; presence is gracious but overwhelming.
Cloud/fire from Exodus 13 now rests on the completed dwelling and guides all journeys.
safety_note: The book ends with presence and guidance, not conquest or domination. Divine glory fills the portable dwelling and leads the liberated people through all journeys.
